name: C-10 --section audit-log --audit-log bundles the audit jsonl log per the architecture
command: printf '{"event":"login","actor":"a","seq":1}\n' > log.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section audit-log --emit p.json --audit-log log.jsonl --commit-sha abc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && grep -q 'login' p.json && echo bundled 1>&2
